title: phragmipedium warscewiczii subsp. exstaminodium
intro: Phragmipedium warscewiczii subsp. exstaminodium is a rare and lesser-known species of orchid, belonging to the phragmipedium genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Phragmipedium warscewiczii subsp. exstaminodium include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the roots and flowers in hot water to produce a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
